rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, explaining the benefits of reordering the paragraphs for better flow and readability.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty regarding the placement of the methodological details and the need to adjust if the paper has a separate Methods section or if Proposition 2 and Algorithm 1 are defined elsewhere.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed dimensions, reordering the paragraphs as requested without altering content, claims, citations, or numerical values.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free and identifies no harmful patterns in the original text. It maintains the integrity of the scientific content.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, such as connecting paragraphs and adjusting transitions.
